pageDescription: Calculate monthly mortgage payments, total interest, and amortization schedule for home loans with property tax and insurance considerations

amortization.title: Amortization
amortization.description: Early payments are mostly interest; later payments are mostly principal

downPayment.title: Down Payment Impact
downPayment.description: Larger down payments reduce loan amount and may eliminate PMI requirement

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides mortgage payment estimates only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual mortgage terms may vary based on lender policies, fees, and creditworthiness

importantNotesList: This is an estimate and does not include all possible fees and charges
PMI is typically required for down payments less than 20%
Property taxes and insurance can vary significantly by location
Consider getting pre-approved for a mortgage before house hunting

messages.enterInformation: Enter your mortgage information to calculate monthly payments
messages.resultMessage: Your mortgage calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides mortgage payment estimates based on standard financial formulas. Actual mortgage terms, payments, and interest may vary based on lender policies, fees, credit score, and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Financial Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized mortgage advice and loan options, consult mortgage brokers or loan officers with expertise in home lending products and individual financial circumstances.

errors.homePrice: Please enter a valid home price

errors.loanAmount: Please enter a valid loan amount
errors.interestRate: Please enter a valid annual interest rate
errors.loanTerm: Please enter a valid loan term

errors.homeInsurance: Please enter a valid annual home insurance amount

errors.hoa: Please enter a valid HOA fee amount

tooltips.downPayment: Amount paid upfront toward the home purchase
tooltips.downPaymentType: Whether down payment is specified as amount or percentage
tooltips.interestRate: Annual interest rate on the mortgage loan
tooltips.loanTerm: Length of time to repay the mortgage (typically 15 or 30 years)
tooltips.propertyTax: Annual property tax assessed by local government
tooltips.pmi: Private Mortgage Insurance required for down payments less than 20%
tooltips.hoa: Monthly fees for Homeowners Association services

calculate_your_complete_mortgage_costs_w:
Calculate your complete mortgage costs with advanced features including extra payments, annual
                increases, and detailed breakdowns.
enter_mortgage_details_to_see_your_payme: Enter mortgage details to see your payment breakdown
